section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.general_idea: Remove the unused import for ArraySchema to clean up the code.
Add a Javadoc comment block to the class to specify the author.
section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.human_impl: Added '/** @author Eazy Bytes */' before the class definition

section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.general_idea: Remove explicit Hibernate native generator configuration in favor of default JPA auto-generation strategy.
section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.human_impl: Removed @GenericGenerator import and annotation, simplified @GeneratedValue to default strategy.

section2/accounts/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.

README.md.general_idea: Refine the main title to emphasize Spring Boot alongside Docker and Kubernetes.
README.md.human_impl: Changed header from 'Master Microservices with Java, Spring, Docker, Kubernetes' to 'Master Microservices with Spring Boot, Docker, Kubernetes'

README.md.general_idea: Switch the hero image source from an external Udemy S3 bucket to a local GitHub repository path.
README.md.human_impl: Updated image URL from udemy-image-web-upload.s3.amazonaws.com to github.com/eazybytes/microservices/blob/main/Microservice.png

README.md.general_idea: Rewrite the list of course sections to reflect updated curriculum structure and content.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced old section list (e.g., 'Section 2 - Microservices & Spring Cloud') with new list (e.g., 'Section 2- Building microservices using Spring Boot')

README.md.general_idea: Adjust the prerequisite list to better align with the updated course content.
README.md.human_impl: Modified bullet points under 'Pre-requisite for the course' to remove specific Java/Spring version constraints or add new ones.

README.md.general_idea: Significantly expand the 'Important Links' section with new tools, blogs, and documentation relevant to the updated course.
README.md.human_impl: Added links for Spring Boot, DTO pattern, Model Mapper, MapStruct, Spring Doc, OpenTelemetry, Jib, and others while removing or reordering old links.

README.md.general_idea: Update Maven command examples to include Google Jib and remove test skip flags where appropriate.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'mvn compile jib:dockerBuild' and removed '-Dmaven.test.skip=true' from 'mvn spring-boot:build-image'

README.md.general_idea: Update Docker command examples to include version tags and new container setups for MySQL, Redis, and Keycloak.
README.md.human_impl: Added ':s4' tags to image names and added commands for running MySQL, Redis, and Keycloak containers.

README.md.general_idea: Introduce a new section for Apache Benchmark commands used for load testing in the course.
Update Kubernetes command examples to reflect new deployment names and operations like PVC management.
README.md.human_impl: Changed deployment names to 'gatewayserver-deployment' and added commands for 'kubectl get pvc' and 'kubectl delete pvc'
